# Creator Acceptance — TASK-NNN

## What I should see
Three to five short observable statements.

## Test steps
1. Exact command or editor action.
2. What to inspect.
3. Expected behavior.

## Result
- [ ] Behavior matches the task contract.
- [ ] Failure/blocker behavior is understandable.
- [ ] No obvious unrelated regression is visible.
- [ ] I approve the tradeoff and player experience.

**Decision:** APPROVE / CHANGES / REJECT  
**Notes:**
